{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Truegold scales
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] possesses ten scales that radiate the power of a [[Truegold]] and are stamped with the crest of the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14">''Underlord'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
